status.title: Boemo
status.defaultDesc: Moreki o ngodisitsoe tlasa affiliate empa ha a eso phethehe ditlhokahalo.

status.failedDesc: Moreki ha a a phethahala ditlhokahalo kapa affiliate o tlolile maemo ha a ntse a fumana moreki.
status.lockedDesc: Akhaonto ea moreki e koetsoe 'me ha e sebetse hape.
status.rejectedDesc: Akhaonto e hlolehile ho phethahala ditlhokahalo ka ho sa phelehi.
status.paidDesc: Affiliate e se e lefiloe ho ingodisa ha moreki enoa.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.q1: 1. Sebopeho sa hau sa khomasene ke sefe?
faqPage.a1: Re lefa khomasene e tekanang ea $100 thekisong e ncha, 'me e le e 'ngoe ea mananeo a mahle ka ho fetisisa a affiliate.
faqPage.q2: 2. Ho nka nako e kae ho thekiso ho bonoa akhounteng ea ka?
faqPage.q3: 3. Ke sena ke entse thekiso. Ke e bone kae?
faqPage.a3_step2: Lehlakoreng le letona la tlase u tla bona khetho ea ho Bona Leqephe la Affiliate.
faqPage.a3_step3: Mona u ka bona likhomesene tsohle tse emetse le tse amohetseng.
faqPage.q4: 4. Ke tseba motho ya hlokang hosting. Ke fumana joang moputso oa ho romela?
faqPage.a4_step2: Phuthuma tlase ho bona khoele ea hau ea affiliate.
faqPage.a4_step3: Romela khoele ena ho motho eo o mo tsebang ya hlokang hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: Ha ba tobetsa khoele eo le ho laela akhaonto le rona, u fumana khomasene.
faqPage.q5: 5. Ke amohetse lenaneo la affiliate la InterServer Hosting. Joale ke etsang?
faqPage.a5_step1: Kena akhounteng ea hau ea affiliate ho fumana mebaraka ea InterServer ka ho tobetsa tab ea Libenara le Likhoele.
faqPage.a5_step2: Khetha mebaraka eo u batlang ho e eketsa saeteng ea hau.
faqPage.a5_step3: U tla bona likhoutu tsa benara lehlakoreng le letona la libenara tsohle; kopitsa 'me u kenya khoutu ena saeteng ea hau.
faqPage.a5_step4: Ha motho a tobetsa khoele eo le ho reka akhaonto ea hosting, u fumana khomasene.
faqPage.q6: 6. Na ke ka PPC ho phahisa InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Ee, empa ka kopo se bide lebitso la rona la korporata, phapang ea lebitso la rona la korporata, phoso ea ho ngola, kapa lentsoe lefe kapa lefe le nang le karolo ea lona ho kenyeletsoa InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Shebana le libido tsa mantsoe joalo ka hosting e potlakileng, hosting ea PHP, hosting ea WordPress.
faqPage.a6_line3: Ka kopo ikopanye le rona haeba u hloka thuso ea ho nahana mantsoe.
faqPage.a6_line4: Etsa bonnete ba ho eketsa InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting e le mantsoe a mahlakoreng a kampeine.
faqPage.q7: 7. Ke entse thekiso. Joale ke lefeloa neng?
faqPage.a7_line1: Kamora matsatsi a 90 thekiso e nepahetseng e tla fetohela ho boemo ba Tloaelo ho ya Emetse.
faqPage.a7_line2: Ha thekiso e Emetse, e tla lefeloa matsatsi a pele a 7 a khoeli.
faqPage.q8: 8. Ke na le thekiso e emetse e sa lefelwang.
faqPage.a8_line1: Mohlomong ho na le mabaka a mang a seng makae a sena. Nako e nngwe re hloka nako e nngwe ho netefatsa thekiso.
faqPage.a8_line2: Ntho e bonolo ea ho lekola ke ho etsa bonnete ba hore mokhoa oa hau oa tefo o behiloe.
faqPage.q9: 9. Lithekiso/likhomesene tsa ka li lula li emetse ho fihlela li amohelwa nako e kae?
faqPage.q10: 10. Na ke ka sebelisa khoele ea ka ea affiliate ho itshupetsa liakhounteng tse ke tla li sebelisang e le tsa botho?
faqPage.a10: Tjhe. Tokomano efe kapa efe le akhaonto e rekiswang e tla baka ho hloleha ho sa phelehi ga thekiso.
faqPage.q11: 11. Ke hobaneng khomasene ea ka e hantsoeng?
faqPage.a11_intro: Ho hantshoa ho bolela hore khomasene e hlolehile ka ho sa phelehi.
faqPage.a11_reasons: Mabaka a mang a sena a ka ba:
faqPage.a11_reason1: Moreki o se a kena le rona mehleng ea fetileng.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Mokhoa o tshoanang oa tefo o sebelisitsoe akhounteng e 'ngoe.
faqPage.a11_reason3: Tsamaiso e fumane hore uena, affiliate, le wena o sebelisa akhaonto ea moreki.
faqPage.a11_policy: Kaha phumanelo ea rona ea $100 thekisong e ncha hangata e feta seo re se busetsang le moreki le ka mora selemo le le 1, re na le maemo a tiileng ho thibela liromelo tse sa khotsofatseng melao-ngola ea rona. Haeba u romela motsoalle kapa moreki, ba nehe feela khoele kapa khuphono. O se arolelane mekhoa ea tefo 'me o se sebelise akhaonto.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Le ka kopo sheba maemo a rona a affiliate mona:
faqPage.q12: 12. Ke moqapi/moetsi oa liporogramme 'me ke tla romela bareki. Na ho lokile?
faqPage.a12_line1: Leano lena ha le a na ho sebetsa le rona (kapa lenaneo lefe kapa lefe la affiliate ea hosting). Ha ho tloaelano tse entsoe liakhounteng tse ngata, likhomesene li hloleha.
faqPage.a12_line2: Sena se entswe ho thibela motho a le mong ho ingodisa le ho fumana chelete lenaolanong la rona la affiliate ka ho itshupetsa.
faqPage.a12_line3: Mohlomong u nahane ka ho tshela bareki ka ho toba 'me u ba fatele wena ka ho sebelisa ntho e joalo ka PayPal. U ka reka akhaonto ea reseller hosting ho rona le ho qala.
faqPage.q13: 13. Ke beha kae tefo ea ka?
faqPage.a13: U ka beha tefo ea hau,
